zh.lifeSummary: 當John Francis Cave於1570年出生在英國萊希斯特斯爾皮可維爾時，他的父親William Anthony Cave35歲，母親Eleanor Margaret de Grey31歲。他於1586年與Magdalena Armyne在英國萊希斯特斯爾皮可維爾結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他於1911年住在英國英格蘭萊希斯特斯爾紐波勒德 維爾頓。他去世於1629年8月13日在英國萊希斯特斯爾皮可維爾享年59歲，埋葬在英國瓦維其可爾福爾希爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Francis Cave于1570年出生在英国萊希斯特斯爾皮可維爾时，他的父亲William Anthony Cave35岁，母亲Eleanor Margaret de Grey31岁。他于1586年与Magdalena Armyne在英国萊希斯特斯爾皮可維爾结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他于1911年住在英国英格兰萊希斯特斯爾紐波勒德 維爾頓。他去世于1629年8月13日在英国萊希斯特斯爾皮可維爾享年59岁，埋葬在英国瓦維其可爾福爾希爾。

nameMeanings.name: Cave
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from a place in East Yorkshire called Cave, apparently from a river name derived from Old English cāf ‘swift’.
English (of Norman origin): nickname from Norman and Picard Old French cauf (from Latin calvus) ‘bald’.
French: topographic name for someone who lived in or near a cave, from Old French cave ‘cave’, ‘cellar’ (from Latin cavea, a derivative of cavus ‘hollow’).

variants.name: Cavin
meanings: Scottish (Wigtownshire): variant of Caveen, a shortened form of Manx Mac Dhaimhín, son of Daimhín. The personal name is a diminutive of Gaelic damh ‘bard, poet’.

variants.name: Caves
meanings: English: variant of Cave , with post-medieval excrescent -s.

variants.name: Keeve
meanings: English: perhaps a variant of   Cave  . This surname is rare in Britain.

variants.name: Chaffee
meanings: English (of Norman origin): descriptive nickname from a derivative of Old French chauf ‘bald’ (from Latin calvus). Compare Cave .

variants.name: Cavett
meanings: Scottish (of French origin): altered form of French Cavet, which is either a diminutive of Cave 3 or a metonymic occupational name for a laborer, one who used a cavet, an Old Occitan word for a tool for clearing ground for cultivation.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

nameMeanings.name: Francis
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: equivalent of Italian Francesco , originally a vocabulary word meaning ‘French’ or ‘Frenchman’ (Late Latin Franciscus; compare Frank ). This was a nickname given to St Francis of Assisi ( 1181–1226 ) because of his wealthy father's business connections with France. His baptismal name was Giovanni . He had a pleasant, ordinary life as a child and young man, but after two serious illnesses, a period of military service, and a year as a prisoner of war in Perugia, he turned from the world and devoted himself to caring for the poor and sick. He was joined by groups of disciples, calling themselves ‘minor friars’ (friari minores). The main features of the Franciscan rule are humility, poverty, and love for all living creatures. The given name occurs occasionally in England as early as 1300 , and more frequently from the early 16th century, when there was a surge of admiration for, and imitation of, Italian Renaissance culture.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

en.lifeSummary: When John Francis Cave was born in 1570, in Pickwell, Leicestershire, England, his father, William Anthony Cave, was 35 and his mother, Eleanor Margaret de Grey, was 31. He married Magdalena Armyne in 1586, in Pickwell, Leicestershire, England. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 1 daughter. He lived in Newbold Verdon, Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom in 1911. He died on 13 August 1629, in Pickwell, Leicestershire, England, at the age of 59, and was buried in Foleshill, Warwickshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Francis Cave est né en 1570, à Pickwell, Leicestershire, Angleterre, son père, William Anthony Cave, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Eleanor Margaret de Grey, avait 31 ans. Il a épousé Magdalena Armyne en 1586, à Pickwell, Leicestershire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 1 fille. Il a vécu à Newbold Verdon, Leicestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni en 1911. Il est décédé le 13 août 1629, à Pickwell, Leicestershire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 59 ans, et a été enterré à Foleshill, Warwickshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Francis Cave 1570 in Pickwell, Leicestershire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater William Anthony Cave 35 und seine Mutter Eleanor Margaret de Grey 31. Er hat 1586 in Pickwell, Leicestershire, England Magdalena Armyne geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 1 Tochter. 1911 hat er in Newbold Verdon, Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom gelebt. Er starb am 13. August 1629 im Alter von 59 Jahren in Pickwell, Leicestershire, England und wurde in Foleshill, Warwickshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Francis Cave è nato il nel 1570 nel Pickwell, Leicestershire, England, il suo padre, William Anthony Cave, aveva 35 anni e il suo madre, Eleanor Margaret de Grey, aveva 31 anni. Lui sposato Magdalena Armyne nel 1586, nel Pickwell, Leicestershire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 1 figlia. Vissuto a Newbold Verdon, Leicestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito nel 1911. Morì il 13 agosto 1629, nel Pickwell, Leicestershire, England, all'età di 59 anni, e fu sepolto a Foleshill, Warwickshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: John Francis Caveが1570年にイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアピックウエルで生まれた時，父William Anthony Caveは35歳，母Eleanor Margaret de Greyは31歳であった。1586年にイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアピックウエルでMagdalena Armyneと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1911年にはイギリスイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアニューボルド バードンに住んでいた。彼は1629年8月13日にイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアピックウエルで59歳で死去し，イギリスワーウィクシュアイアフォレシュイルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John Francis Cave(이)가 1570년 영국 레이스스터실르 피ck웰에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Anthony Cave(은)는 35세였고, 그의 어머니 Eleanor Margaret de Grey(은)는 31세였다. 그는 1586년 영국 레이스스터실르 피ck웰에서 Magdalena Armyne(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 1911년도에 영국 잉글랜드 레이스스터실르 뉴볼드 베르든에서 살았다. 그는 1629년 8월 13일 영국 레이스스터실르 피ck웰에서 59세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 워윅실르 폴레시에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Francis Cave nasceu em 1570, em Pickwell, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, seu pai, William Anthony Cave, tinha 35 anos e sua mãe, Eleanor Margaret de Grey, tinha 31 anos. Ele casou-se com Magdalena Armyne em 1586, em Pickwell, Leicestershire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 1 filha. Ele viveu em Newbold Verdon, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom em 1911. Ele faleceu em 13 de agosto de 1629, em Pickwell, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, com 59 anos, e foi sepultado em Foleshill, Warwickshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Francis Cave родился в 1570 г. в местности пикквелл, лисестиршир, Англия, его отцу по имени William Anthony Cave было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Eleanor Margaret de Grey, 31. Он женился на женщине по имени Magdalena Armyne в 1586 г. в местности пикквелл, лисестиршир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 1 дочь. Он жил в местности нюболд вирдон, лисестиршир, Англия, Великобритания в 1911 году. Он умер 13 августа 1629 г. в местности пикквелл, лисестиршир, Англия в возрасте 59 лет и был похоронен в местности фолешилл, варвиккшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Francis Cave nació en 1570, en Pickwell, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, su papá, William Anthony Cave, tenía 35 años y su mamá, Eleanor Margaret de Grey, tenía 31 años. Se casó con Magdalena Armyne en 1586, en Pickwell, Leicestershire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 1 hija. Vivió en Newbold Verdon, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido en 1911. Murió el 13 de agosto de 1629, en Pickwell, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 59 años, y fue sepultado en Foleshill, Warwickshire, Inglaterra.
